title: Strategic Commodity Manager (Semiconductor Industry)
description:
Responsibilities

  • Drive and support the execution of the regional commodity strategy in alignment with global procurement goals, ensuring the development of a strong and sustainable supplier base across Asia.
  • Build and maintain a robust supplier portfolio by identifying potential vendors, participating in onboarding decisions, managing supplier data, and overseeing supplier classification throughout the full lifecycle.
  • Strengthen supplier relationships through regular engagement, business reviews, and international visits, including negotiating annual volumes, capacities, and supporting supplier audits.
  • Act as a key escalation point for supplier-related issues, leading negotiations and recommending corrective measures or strategy adjustments when required.
  • Monitor procurement and supplier risks on an ongoing basis, evaluate mitigation options, coordinate implementation of risk actions, and report progress to global stakeholders.
  • Identify cost-reduction opportunities, develop savings plans, track implementation, and prepare savings reports aligned with annual targets.
  • Lead supplier transfer or relocation projects by assessing strategic, cost, performance, and risk considerations, ensuring smooth transition and continuity of supply.
  • Support procurement process improvements by contributing to digitalization and standardization initiatives, assisting in supplier selection and performance enhancement, and handling escalations for supplier complaints as required by operations.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or higher qualification in Supply Chain, Procurement, Engineering, Business, or a related field.
  • Minimum 3 years of experience in commodity management, strategic sourcing, or supplier management within a regional or global procurement environment.
  • Strong negotiation, stakeholder management, and relationship-building skills, with the ability to manage suppliers across multiple countries.
  • Proactive, analytical, and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage complex projects, mitigate risks, and support continuous improvement initiatives.

Please submit your updated resume in Word format by using the Apply Now Button.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Email resume to ken.ng@peopleprofilers.com

Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
